title: codereview pass 3: missing integration of SenML for DTN in deaddrop, build may fail without updating CMakeLists and adding resource
description: codereview finding P1: the stub uses oscore_init but no SenML encode/decode replacing any memcpy (no memcpy in deaddrop yet). Update coap_server.c to include /deaddrop resource using senml_encode for DTN payloads. Also update CMakeLists.txt and call the register from init. All findings must be fixed before closing ykvk.1
close_reason: Integrated SenML for DTN in coap_dtn.c, Zephyr build and test passed with no errors
